violations.text: The establishment is using time for its pizza slices. Establishment is not maintaining adequate records for slices (no records of disposal in the month of February.) New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an bio-film. Ice machine will be emptied and washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
